caption: A man with a light complexion and a distinctive, tall, silver-gray wig sits in a studio setting. He wears glasses, black over-ear headphones, a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, and a red bow tie. He is positioned behind a professional microphone on a boom arm. The background consists of a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and clothing items on mannequins. On-screen logos are visible, including a circular emblem with the text "PODCAST" and a red graphic reading "BOSS TALK JOY PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a static seated position, speaking and gesturing slightly with his mouth and facial expressions. The lighting is bright and consistent across the scene, and the camera remains stationary, capturing the man from the chest up as he communicates in the studio environment.
